scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && cp announce.html dist/ && cp meeting.html dist/ && cp meeting.js dist/ && cp meeting.css dist/
scripts.start: npm run build && python3 -m http.server 5000 --directory dist
scripts.test: node --check supabase/functions/processEntryFee.js supabase/functions/processWithdrawal.js supabase/functions/createHandshakeSession.js supabase/functions/createStripeCheckout.js supabase/functions/stripeWebhook.js supabase/functions/aiAgentAnalyze.js supabase/functions/newsWebhook.js supabase/functions/generatePressRelease.js supabase/functions/syndicateAnnouncement.js supabase/functions/generateInstantRoom.js supabase/functions/documentBridge.js supabase/functions/aiSecretaryTools.js supabase/functions/aiComplianceLawyer.js supabase/functions/predictiveIntelligenceEngine.js && node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; const sql = readFileSync('supabase/schema.sql', 'utf8'); if (!sql.includes('green_acc_deals')) throw new Error('Supabase schema missing green_acc_deals table'); if (!sql.includes('entry_fee_status')) throw new Error('Schema missing entry_fee_status field'); if (!sql.includes('deal_announcements')) throw new Error('Schema missing deal_announcements table'); if (!sql.includes('global_news')) throw new Error('Schema missing global_news table'); if (!sql.includes('instant_rooms')) throw new Error('Schema missing instant_rooms table'); if (!sql.includes('compliance_logs')) throw new Error('Schema missing compliance_logs table'); if (!sql.includes('behavioral_signals')) throw new Error('Schema missing behavioral_signals table'); if (!sql.includes('market_trends')) throw new Error('Schema missing market_trends table'); if (!sql.includes('prediction_alerts')) throw new Error('Schema missing prediction_alerts table'); console.log('Validation passed');"
